title: Fix body class sync stripping sb-comment-mode
description: syncOverrideClasses() was removing sb-comment-mode from body, killing overlay pointer-events. Fixed by only treating sb-{key}--{value} classes as overrides.

title: Validate PAT has discussion access at sign-in
description: validateToken() now probes GraphQL API to verify token can access repo discussions. Shows clear error for missing scopes, missing repo, or no discussion categories.
